zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Matthew Furneaux於大約1264年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓時，他的父親Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux54歲，母親Constant Hughley28歲。他於大約1284年與Maud Raleigh在英國薩默塞特內特萊可姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1316年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特吉爾福享年54歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特阿生頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Matthew Furneaux于大约1264年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓时，他的父亲Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux54岁，母亲Constant Hughley28岁。他于大约1284年与Maud Raleigh在英国薩默塞特內特萊可姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1316年在英国英格兰薩默塞特吉爾福享年54岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特阿生頓。

nameMeanings.name: Furneaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either of two places in Normandy called Fourneaux ‘(the) furnaces’, one in Manche, the other in Calvados. Compare   Furnace   and   Furnell  .

variants.name: Furney
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Furneaux  . It may sometimes have been confused with   Furness  ; the two names have variants in common (see   Furnace  ).

variants.name: Fornell
meanings: English: variant of Furneaux , or a nickname from Middle English fornel ‘small oven or furnace’.

variants.name: Furnace
meanings: (of Norman origin): sometimes a variant of   Furneaux  .

variants.name: Furnell
meanings: alternatively, perhaps a variant of   Farnell  . Compare   Funnell  .

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Matthew Furneaux was born about 1264, in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux, was 54 and his mother, Constant Hughley, was 28. He married Maud Raleigh about 1284, in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died about 1316, in Kilve, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Matthew Furneaux est né environ 1264, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Constant Hughley, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Maud Raleigh environ 1284, à Nettlecombe, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé environ 1316, à Kilve, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Matthew Furneaux um 1264 in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux 54 und seine Mutter Constant Hughley 28. Er hat um 1284 in Nettlecombe, Somerset, England Maud Raleigh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb um 1316 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Kilve, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ashington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Matthew Furneaux è nato il circa 1264 nel Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Constant Hughley, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Maud Raleigh circa 1284, nel Nettlecombe, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì circa 1316, nel Kilve, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Ashington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew Furneauxが約1264年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneauxは54歳，母Constant Hughleyは28歳であった。約1284年にイギリスソメルセトネットレコンベでMaud Raleighと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は約1316年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトキルブで54歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトアシュイントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Matthew Furneaux(이)가 대략 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Constant Hughley(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1284년 영국 서머세트 네틀렉브에서 Maud Raleigh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1316년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 킬브에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 애신그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Matthew Furneaux nasceu aproximadamente 1264, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Constant Hughley, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Raleigh aproximadamente 1284, em Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1316, em Kilve, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Matthew Furneaux родился около 1264 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Constant Hughley, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Raleigh около 1284 г. в местности неттлекомб, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер около 1316 г. в местности килв, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.Abt 1264–Abt 1316: e tusa o le 1264–e tusa o le 1316

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Matthew Furneaux nació aproximadamente 1264, en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Knight Matthew Somerset Furneaux, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Constant Hughley, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Maud Raleigh aproximadamente 1284, en Nettlecombe, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1316, en Kilve, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
